ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the dataset is associated with */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team working on the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic data (e.g., DNA, RNA, Protein) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTA, VCF, BAM) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total amount of funding */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank */,
  "ncbi_tax_id" INTEGER /* NCBI taxonomy ID for the species */,
  "common_names" TEXT /* Multiple common names (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the team is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team's expertise and focus */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL for the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "scaffold" TEXT /* Scaffold identifier */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the genomic region */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the genomic region */,
  "mid_position" INTEGER /* Mid position of the genomic region */,
  "sites" INTEGER /* Number of sites in the genomic region */,
  "pi_parP" REAL /* Nucleotide diversity (pi) in the genomic region */,
  "genoPS_parP" REAL /* Genotype frequency (genoPS) in the genomic region */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic data (e.g., sequencing, assembly, annotation) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the data */,
  "data_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the data (e.g., publication, database entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the collection site */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "sample_preservation_method" TEXT /* Method used to preserve the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample source */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Steps involved in processing the data */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was processed */,
  "processed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who processed the data */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing the data */,
  "processing_params" TEXT /* Parameters used during data processing (JSON object) */,
  "processing_version" TEXT /* Version of the processing software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sample_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., FASTA, VCF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
